title: Market Exploration: Modelling and Monitoring Conflict Wounds
body: " Market exploration image for Conflict Wounds  On behalf of the Defence Science and Technology Laboratory (Dstl) and the UK Ministry of Defence (MOD) Defence Medical Services (DMS), DASA is running a Market Exploration to explore the current research environment and identify technologies that can model and monitor traumatic wounds. This will form part of a wider scoping effort under the newly funded Conflict Wound Research Network (CWRN)[1] and will give a better understanding of market capability in this space to inform future activities under the network, including potential funding opportunities.  Submissions must be submitted by Midday 12:00 (BST) on 30 September 2025.    [1] For more information on the CWRN and to be kept up to date as the Network develops, please email CWRN@dstl.gov.uk. "
